name: Baby Bok Choy Steamed with Orange Zest and Ginger
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon orange zest, julienned or grated
1/4 teaspoon ginger-infused sesame oil OR minced ginger to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the bok choy well.
2. Cut each bok choy in half lengthwise.
3. Place the bok choy in a single layer on a rack in a steamer, cut side up.
4. Sprinkle with orange zest.
5. Place a portion of ginger oil (or minced ginger) at the heart of the vegetable.
6. Cover and cook over for 6 to 8 minutes, or until fork-tender.
7. Serve with the orange zest.
